headlines.title: Curiosity Shakes Loose a Pesky Rock
headlines.summary: After NASA’s Curiosity Mars rover drilled a sample from this rock on April 25, 2026, it withdrew its robotic arm and pulled the entire rock off the surface with it. Engineers spent several days repositioning the arm and
